are_you_ok.title: 1.5 million eggs sold at Kroger, Brookshire and smaller stores recalled
are_you_ok.summary: Systemic effect recall (salmonella eggs) reaching wherever sold, likely includes this metro.
are_you_ok.description: Salmonella fears spurred the recall of over 1.5 million eggs that were sold in multiple states under several different brand names.

conversation_starters.title: Loring Park Art Festival brings 165 artists, live music, and fashion shows to Minneapolis this weeke
conversation_starters.summary: Marquee Minneapolis festival, good conversation starter. You could open with: 'Are you heading to the Loring Park Art Festival this weekend?'
conversation_starters.description: The two-day outdoor festival features visual artists, live music, a culinary market, and a fashion show both days at 1:30 p.m.

conversation_starters.title: New report shows crime trending down in Minneapolis
conversation_starters.summary: Metro-wide crime trend (homicide down 30%) — widely known, positive, work-safe. You could open with: 'Did you see crime's actually trending down in Minneapolis this year?'
conversation_starters.description: The homicide rate has lowered 30% in Minneapolis in 2026 as compared to the previous year.

conversation_starters.title: This Lake Superior island seen in Split Rock Lighthouse photos now has a following of its own — and you can walk to it
conversation_starters.summary: Charming local-lore story about a Lake Superior island; fun, novel, work-safe. You could open with: 'Did you hear about that little island that keeps showing up in Split Rock Lighthouse photos?'
conversation_starters.description: Thousands of pictures of Split Rock Lighthouse​ are taken each year. And oftentimes a little island appears in those photos. Ellingsen Island has developed a following of its own.

you_should_know.title: Live updates: Vance Boelter to be sentenced for MN lawmakers shootings
you_should_know.summary: Major local case outcome, sentencing of lawmaker shooter - high impact current event.
you_should_know.description: Vance Boelter will appear in court to face sentencing on Thursday for the shootings of two Minnesota lawmakers last year.

you_should_know.title: St. Paul leasing office shooting victims remembered for kindness, friendship and devotion to family
you_should_know.summary: Court appearance for St. Paul leasing-office mass shooting; a widely-known local killing with victims remembered. Outcome-oriented, worth walking in aware of, not a safe opener.
you_should_know.description: The man charged in the killings made his first court appearance Wednesday. His bail remains set at $10 million.

you_should_know.title: St. Paul authorizes $1 million for expanding shelters ahead of planned encampment closures
you_should_know.summary: St. Paul City Council funds shelter expansion ahead of encampment closures — a local government outcome on homelessness landing here. Institutional context, not a check-in or safe opener.
you_should_know.description: After officials in Minnesota's capital city announced they would shut down encampments​ for those experiencing homelessness, the City Council approved more than $1 million to expand capacity at local shelters.
